value.stringValue: URGENT: Patient Did Not Get Their Lab Results
URGENT: Patient Did Not Get Their Lab Results
Error sending email to Lab Order Owner {!rec_LabOrder.Owner:User.Email}
Error sending email to Lab Order Owner {!rec_LabOrder.Owner:User.Email}

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_Results_email_to_patient
actionCalls.label: Log Fault Results email to patient

value.stringValue: Error sending Results email to Patient

value.stringValue: Error sending Gut Health Results email to Patient

value.stringValue: Error sending Results email to Patient

value.stringValue: Error sending PGT Results email to Patient

value.stringValue: Gut Health Results emailed to patient
Incorrect Person Email, results not sent

actionCalls.label: Log MGT results sent to patient

value.stringValue: No Person Email, results not sent

actionCalls.name: Log_PGT_results_sent_to_patient

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Patient_Genetic_Testing
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Patient - Genetic Testing

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Patient_Gut_Health
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Patient - Gut Health

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Patient_Precision_Genetic_Test
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Patient - Precision Genetic Test

value.stringValue: Error: No Patient Email Set on Patient {!rec_LabOrder.Name}

assignments.name: Set_Email_Template_GT_Kit_Sent
assignments.label: Set Email Template - GT - Kit Sent

assignments.name: Set_Email_Template_GT_Kit_Sent_PGT
assignments.label: Set Email Template - GT - Kit Sent PGT

assignments.name: Set_Email_Template_Gut_Health_Kit_Sent
assignments.label: Set Email Template - Gut Health - Kit Sent

constants.description: Used to denote the Email Template DeveloperName for the Genetic Testing results when a Protocol Cart Link is present.
constants.name: txt_MGTProtocolLinkTemplate

decisions.description: We check if the email has been bounced, if the email is bounced we can't send an email
decisions.name: Did_Email_Bounce
decisions.label: Did Email Bounce?

decisions.description: If the status is Pending Fulfillment, we need to send Confirmation email
decisions.name: Do_we_need_to_send_Confirmation
decisions.label: Do we need to send Confirmation

decisions.description: Check if the Lab Order has a Protocol Cart Link to determine if the Protocol Linked Email Template can be used. If the Protocol Cart Link is empty, continue to use the Product's email template.
decisions.name: Has_Protocol_Cart_Link_for_Lab_Order
decisions.label: Has Protocol Cart Link for Lab Order
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No Lab Order Protocol Cart Link

rules.name: Lab_Order_Protocol_Cart_Link_Populated
rules.label: Lab Order Protocol Cart Link Populated

decisions.description: Check if we need to notify about Lab Order Updates (confirmation/tracking) or Results Received
decisions.name: Updates_or_Results_Received
decisions.label: Updates or Results Received

decisions.description: This decision does a lot to ensure that we not only have a To Address but we also have an Email Template as well. This then checks if the email is provided that this email isn't marked as bounced. Then we go into specific services different email actions and if there is an attachment then we will send an email with the attachment else we will just send them the email with no attachment.
decisions.name: Was_Email_Template_found
decisions.label: Was Email Template found

rules.name: Any_Results_Recieved_that_has_an_Email_Template_and_To_Address
rules.label: Any Results Recieved that has an Email Template and To Address

decisions.description: Depending on the service we will send different emails with their tracking information
decisions.name: What_Service_Was_Shipped
decisions.label: What Service Was Shipped

Flow.description: Autolaunch flow that gets called by record trigger emailer flows. It handles sending the correct email

formulas.description: This will get the correct email template for the specific lab.
formulas.name: form_KitSentEmailTemplate

Flow.label: Autolaunch - Lab Order - Emailer

recordLookups.name: Get_Email_Template_Kit_Shipped_Client
recordLookups.label: Get Email Template - Kit Shipped - Client

recordLookups.name: Get_Email_Template_Kit_Shipped_Gut_Health
recordLookups.label: Get Email Template - Kit Shipped - Gut Health

recordLookups.name: Get_Email_Template_Kit_Shipped_PGT
recordLookups.label: Get Email Template - Kit Shipped - PGT

recordLookups.name: Get_Email_Template_MGT_Results_Protocol_Link
recordLookups.label: Get Email Template - MGT Results Protocol Link

recordLookups.name: Get_Org_Wide_Email_for_Operations
recordLookups.label: Get Org Wide Email for Operations

subflows.name: Get_Email_Template_for_Approved_Confirmation_1
subflows.label: Get Email Template for Approved Confirmation

textTemplates.name: txt_ErrorMessage_EmailBounced
txtEmailBodyTemplate_Internal
textTemplates.text:
INTERNAL NOTIFICATION:

We have received the {!rec_LabOrder.Product__r.Services_Provided__c} Results for {!rec_LabOrder.First_Name__c} {!rec_LabOrder.Last_Name__c}


Lab Order Link: {!LabOrderLink}


Thank You

10X Automated Service

{{ Record Trigger - Lab Order - Emailer }}

textTemplates.name: txtErrorNoPatientEmail
textTemplates.text:
On {!rec_LabOrder.Name} there was no patient email, so the email that was supposed to be sent was not sent.



{{ After Save: Lab Order Emailer }}

textTemplates.name: txtErrorPatientEmailInvalid
textTemplates.text:
The patient, {!rec_LabOrder.Patient__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Patient__r.LastName}, did not get their lab results from the {!rec_LabOrder.Product__r.Services_Provided__c} Lab Order because the email address on their account is invalid. Please update the email address on their Account record and then go into the Opportunity and send the results to the patient.


Again, this is a critical note, and you must send the results to the patient, or they will never get them. If you have questions, please reach out to the internal support team.


Thank You

10X Automated Service

{{ Record Trigger - Lab Order - Emailer }}

textTemplates.description: When the first tracking number is filled in and stage = 'Kit Sent' this internal email body will be sent
textTemplates.name: txtKitSent_GT_Internal
textTemplates.text:
INTERNAL NOTIFICATION:


The Genetic Test Kit for the Lab Order for the account {!rec_LabOrder.Patient__r.Name} has been shipped. Please click the link below to track the package:

{!rec_LabOrder.Shipping_Link_to_Patient__c}


To open this opportunity in Salesforce, please click below

{!txtRecordLink}


Regards,

10X Health

Main: 305.682.1818

Fax: 786.598.8612

10xhealthsystem.com

textTemplates.name: txtStageApproved_GT_Internal
textTemplates.text:
INTERNAL NOTIFICATION:


The Genetic Test Kit for the Lab Order for the account {!rec_LabOrder.Patient__r.Name} has been approved.


To open this opportunity in Salesforce, please click below

{!txtRecordLink}


Regards,

10X Health

Main: 305.682.1818

Fax: 786.598.8612

10xhealthsystem.com

textTemplates.name: txtStagePendingResult_GT_Internal
textTemplates.text:
INTERNAL NOTIFICATION:


The Genetic Test Kit for the Lab Order for the account {!rec_LabOrder.Patient__r.Name} has been sent back to CellScience, and waiting for the results.


To open this opportunity in Salesforce, please click below

{!txtRecordLink}


Regards,

10X Health

Main: 305.682.1818

Fax: 786.598.8612

10xhealthsystem.com
